changeSet.author: reviq
reviq
changeSet.sql:
INSERT INTO default_role_template (id, code, name, description) VALUES (gen_random_uuid(), 'ANALYST', 'Analyst', 'View-only access to data and reports');
INSERT INTO default_role_template_permission (role_template_id, permission_id) SELECT drt.id, p.id FROM default_role_template drt, permission p WHERE drt.code = 'ANALYST' AND p.code IN ('DASHBOARD_VIEW', 'SALES_VIEW', 'PRODUCTS_VIEW', 'CUSTOMERS_VIEW', 'INVENTORY_VIEW', 'REPORTS_VIEW');
